title: Files, Paths, CSV, JSON, and Data Boundaries
description: Import, validate, transform, and safely publish local nonprofit program data. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a repeatable data-quality reporting pipeline while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Read and write text and binary files with explicit paths, encoding, newline, and lifetime.
Serialize CSV and JSON without confusing transport format with trusted schema.
Protect original data through validation and safe output replacement.
